title: OTIS Launches the Digitally Connected Gen3 Core Elevator
text: OTIS introduces the Gen3 Core elevator under the Gen3 umbrella to support North America's growing demand for two-to-six-story buildings.

title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.
